name: font-face
desc: Replace the primary GDI UI font face string 'MS UI Gothic' (VA 0x0077402c) with 'Pretendard'. RE: FUN_004ea180 calls FUN_004aec10(s_MS_UI_Gothic_0077402c,...) for the UI CFont cache used by FUN_004aec70. The D3D texture-glyph atlas has a separate face slot at DAT_0076e240 handled by font-atlas-face.json. Both CreateFontA sites already pass HANGEUL_CHARSET (0x81, encoded as `push -0x7f`); text quality is handled by the separate default-stack `font-cleartype` patch. Same-length 16-byte in-place region replace (face <=15 chars + NUL, bounded by the following 'mkCreateVertexBuffer'); NO code cave. RE/docs: docs/logh7-font-remaster.md.
verified: ENCODED + originalHex guarded for vanilla references; current playable/installed trees may already contain the patched face. Same-length region patch (no cave). Requires 'Pretendard' present on the host; for the shipped Pretendard face, launcher/ui_explorer must register the bundled fonts before client start.

patches.note: global GDI font face 'MS UI Gothic' -> 'Pretendard' (16-byte slot, NUL-padded)
